title: bromus squarrosus var. balsiensis
intro: Bromus squarrosus var. balsiensis, also known as Balsam Brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Balsam Brome include relief from digestive issues, reduction of fever, and soothing of skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Balsam Brome typically involve drying and infusing the plant in hot water or making it into a tea, which can be consumed to reap its benefits.
